states.name: Ludorié
states.title: Chief of the Dandelio Elves
states.description: Ludorié is one of the two chiefs of Dandelio a forest region inhabited by elves and kud. He considers his fellow chief Sherry as his dearest friend. Earnest and reliable, Ludorié feels a great deal of responsibility to his people, but is distrusting of outsiders. Those who gain his trust, however, gain a fiercely loyal ally.

states.name: Ludorié
states.title: Chief of the Dandelio Elves
states.description: During the previous Pandemonium, a small but influential group of humans began accusing elves of siding with demons. Many elves sought refuge in Dandelio, and Ludorié began to harbor resentment toward humans. His harsh attitude caused Dandelio to become known as unfriendly to human travelers.
